The actress, who is known for playing Miss Clara Livingston in the Netflix period drama, looked a far cry from the role as she donned black suspenders and lacy underwear. Showing off her...

title: 4 gas pilferers caught in Laguna
description: ALAMINOS, Laguna – Police arrested three drivers and a helper for pilfering gasoline from a tanker on Wednesday night, April 22, on the Alaminos-Lipa Bypass Road in Barangay San Miguel, this town. The suspects were identified as drivers Roberto, 34; Fernan, 33; and Mark Paolo Samson, 29, and helper Jerico Santos, 30. The suspects were caught in the act of transferring gasoline worth P40,000 from a tanker to a drum. They and pieces of evidence are in the custody of the Alaminos police. Police have informed the suspects' employer of their modus operandi and charges have been filed against them. NPA amazon A New People’s Army amazon surrendered to the police in Sitio Patula, Barangay Cansuso, Cavinti, Laguna on Wednesday, April 22. A member of the Sangay ng Partido sa Lokalidad recruited in 2004, she was involved in organizing farming communities, recruitment of members within rural areas, mobilization of the women's and peasant sectors, and dissemination of ideological materials supporting the group's political agenda.

title: Two GOP senators break ranks on final Senate budget vote
